content:
apiVersion: cert-manager.io/v1
kind: ClusterIssuer
metadata:
  name: "cloudflare"
spec:
  acme:
    email: "admin@example.net"
    server: "https://acme-v02.api.letsencrypt.org/directory"
    privateKeySecretRef:
      name: "cloudflare-acme-account-key"
    solvers:
      - dns01:
          cloudflare:
            apiTokenSecretRef:
              name: "cloudflare-api-token"
              key: "api-token"

apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Kustomization
resources:
  - namespace.yaml
  - cluster-issuer-cloudflare.yaml
  - traefik-default-tls.yaml
  - traefik-forward-auth-middleware.yaml

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: "edge-system"

apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
kind: TLSStore
metadata:
  name: "default"
  namespace: "edge-system"
spec:
  defaultCertificate:
    secretName: "wildcard-tls"

apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
kind: Middleware
metadata:
  name: "forward-auth"
  namespace: "edge-system"
spec:
  forwardAuth:
    address: "http://forward-auth.edge-system.svc.cluster.local:4181"
    trustForwardHeader: true
    authResponseHeaders:
      - "X-Forwarded-User"
      - "X-Forwarded-Email"

apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Kustomization
resources:
  - jellyfin

apiVersion: monitoring.coreos.com/v1
kind: PrometheusRule
metadata:
  name: "platform-alerts"
  namespace: "observability"
spec:
  groups:
    - name: platform.rules
      rules:
        - alert: FluxKustomizationNotReady
          expr: gotk_resource_info{ready!="True", customresource_kind="Kustomization"} == 1
          for: "10m"
          labels:
            severity: warning
          annotations:
            summary: "Flux Kustomization is not ready"
        - alert: KubernetesPodCrashLooping
          expr: rate(kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total[15m]) > 3
          for: "10m"
          labels:
            severity: warning
          annotations:
            summary: "Pod restart rate exceeded threshold"

apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: "gatus-config"
  namespace: "observability"
data:
  config.yaml: |
    storage:
      type: sqlite
      path: /data/gatus.db
    ui:
      title: "personal-stack status"
      description: "personal-stack service health"
      header: "personal-stack status"
    endpoints: []

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: "gatus"
  namespace: "observability"
spec:
  replicas: 1
  strategy:
    type: Recreate
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: "gatus"
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: "gatus"
    spec:
      nodeSelector:
        "personal-stack/site": "frankfurt"
      containers:
        - name: gatus
          image: "twinproduction/gatus:v5.20.0"
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          args:
            - "--config"
            - "/config"
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8080
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "50m"
              memory: "64Mi"
            limits:
              memory: "256Mi"
          volumeMounts:
            - name: data
              mountPath: /data
            - name: config
              mountPath: /config/config.yaml
              subPath: config.yaml
            - name: endpoints
              mountPath: /config/endpoints.yaml
              subPath: endpoints.yaml
      volumes:
        - name: data
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            claimName: "gatus-data"
        - name: config
          configMap:
            name: "gatus-config"
        - name: endpoints
          configMap:
            name: "gatus-endpoints"

apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Kustomization
resources:
  - config.yaml
  - gatus-endpoints-configmap.yaml
  - pvc.yaml
  - deployment.yaml
  - service.yaml

apiVersion: v1
kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
metadata:
  name: "gatus-data"
  namespace: "observability"
spec:
  accessModes:
    - ReadWriteOnce
  storageClassName: "local-path"
  resources:
    requests:
      storage: "1Gi"

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: "gatus"
  namespace: "observability"
spec:
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: "gatus"
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: http

apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: "grafana-datasources"
  namespace: "observability"
  labels:
    grafana_datasource: "1"
data:
  datasources.yaml: |
    apiVersion: 1
    datasources:
      - name: Prometheus
        type: prometheus
        access: proxy
        url: "http://metrics-stack-kube-prom-prometheus:9090"
        isDefault: true
        jsonData:
          exemplarTraceIdDestinations:
            - name: trace_id
              datasourceUid: tempo
      - name: Loki
        type: loki
        access: proxy
        url: "http://loki:3100"
        jsonData:
          derivedFields:
            - name: TraceID
              matcherRegex: "trace[_-]?id=(\\w+)"
              datasourceUid: tempo
              url: "$${__value.raw}"
      - name: Tempo
        uid: tempo
        type: tempo
        access: proxy
        url: "http://tempo:3200"
        jsonData:
          tracesToLogsV2:
            datasourceUid: Loki
          tracesToMetrics:
            datasourceUid: Prometheus
      - name: Pyroscope
        type: grafana-pyroscope-datasource
        access: proxy
        url: "http://pyroscope:4040"

apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Kustomization
resources:
  - namespace.yaml
  - helm-repositories.yaml
  - metrics-stack/release.yaml
  - grafana/release.yaml
  - grafana/grafana-datasources.yaml
  - grafana-operator/release.yaml
  - loki/release.yaml
  - tempo/release.yaml
  - alloy/release.yaml
  - gatus/kustomization.yaml
  - alerts/platform-alerts.yaml

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: "observability"

apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Kustomization
resources:
  - app-ui
